frameworkNotes: Nuxt 4 (srcDir=app/), Nitro server routes = backend, Vue 3 <script setup> = frontend. Design system = shadcn-vue (app/components/ui). Charts = @unovis/vue. Types = shared/types.ts (zod). Persistence = Nitro useStorage (unstorage fs driver, no native deps). LLM = pluggable provider (Ollama default, Anthropic optional, mock fallback).

contract.importAlias: #shared/types in server, ~/../shared/types or auto-imported in app where possible; use relative imports if alias unavailable

apiRoutes.desc: Load seeded agents/calls/transcripts into storage. Returns counts.
One agent with health + its calls + recommendations.
apiRoutes.returns: { health: AgentHealth, calls: CallListItem[], recommendations: Recommendation[] }

apiRoutes.desc: Filterable call list (query: agentId, severity, outcome).
Call detail: call + agent + transcript + analysis.
Run/re-run analysis on one call. Idempotent via transcriptHash cache. Body: { force?:boolean }.
FUNCTIONAL: poll GHL /voice-ai/dashboard/call-logs via PIT, ingest new calls. Returns ingested count.
FUNCTIONAL: receive Voice AI call-completed / transcript-generated webhook, upsert call+transcript, trigger analysis.
Decode GHL signed user-context (iframe). Body/query: { encryptedData }. Returns location/user identity.

data.produces: Storage helpers (getAgent, listAgents, upsertCall, getTranscript, getAnalysis, upsertAnalysis...) over Nitro useStorage; >=3 agents and >=6 realistic transcripts with DELIBERATE deviations/failures/missed-opportunities so the dashboard has signal.

api.produces: Read routes that aggregate stored analyses into FleetStats/AgentHealth/CallListItem/CallDetail. Tolerates calls without analysis (score null).

llm.produces: LLMProvider interface { complete<T>(opts:{system,user,schema,schemaName}):Promise<T> }; Ollama impl (POST /api/chat, format=jsonSchema, stream:false); Anthropic impl (consult claude-api skill; model claude-opus-4-8, output_config.format json_schema); mock impl (deterministic). analysis.ts builds prompt from agent goal/script/criteria + turn-indexed transcript, calls provider, zod-validates AnalysisResult, returns Analysis. criteria.ts derives successCriteria from goal/script if missing (cached on agent).

ui.produces: Three screens using shadcn-vue (app/components/ui) + @unovis/vue charts + lucide-vue-next icons. Beautiful, GHL-native chrome. Call drill-down highlights flagged transcript turns; clicking a finding scrolls/highlights cited turns.
ui.constraints: DO NOT edit package.json (all shadcn components pre-installed). Use existing app/components/ui/*. Fetch via useFetch/$fetch against the API routes.

ghl.produces: PIT-authenticated GHL REST client (call-logs list/get, agents) using runtimeConfig.ghlPitToken + ghlApiBase; maps GHL call-log -> Call+Transcript; sync route; webhook receiver; signed user-context decrypt (AES via shared secret) + postMessage bridge composable.

docs.produces: README: architecture diagram (text), Team-of-One ownership (Product/Design/Eng/QA), functional-vs-mocked table, GHL sandbox install steps. .env.example with all runtimeConfig keys.

llmIO.input: system: Voice AI QA analyst role + definitions(deviation/failure/missed_opportunity) + severity rubric + 'cite evidence by turn index, never invent turns'. user: agent goal+script+successCriteria, then turn-indexed transcript ([0] agent: ..., [1] customer: ...).
llmIO.output: JSON matching AnalysisResultSchema (summary, scorecard, findings[], recommendations[], useActions[]).
